name: ColorCMYK
summary: Represents a CMYK (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Key) color with double precision floating point channels. CMYK colors are used primarily in printing environments as they provide a good simulation of physical ink.

constructors.name: ColorCMYK(Color)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of ColorCMYK that is equivalent to an ARGB color.
constructors.remarks: Exact conversions between color spaces are often not possible.

constructors.name: ColorCMYK(Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorCMYK(double cyan, double magenta, double yellow)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of ColorCMYK with custom channel values. The cyan, magenta and yellow values will be adjusted based on their combined darkness.

constructors.name: ColorCMYK(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorCMYK(double cyan, double magenta, double yellow, double key)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of ColorCMYK with custom channel values.

params.name: cyan
params.doc: Cyan channel value. Cyan channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: magenta
params.doc: Magenta channel value. Magenta channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: yellow
params.doc: Yellow channel value. Yellow channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: key
params.doc: Key channel value. Key channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

constructors.name: ColorCMYK(Double, Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorCMYK(double alpha, double cyan, double magenta, double yellow, double key)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of ColorCMYK with custom channel values.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Alpha channel value. Alpha channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: cyan
params.doc: Cyan channel value. Cyan channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: magenta
params.doc: Magenta channel value. Magenta channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: yellow
params.doc: Yellow channel value. Yellow channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

params.name: key
params.doc: Key channel value. Key channels are limited to the 0.0 and 1.0 range.

methods.name: CreateFromHSL
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest CMYK equivalent of an HSL color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the HSL color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSV
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest CMYK equivalent of an HSV color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the HSV color.

methods.name: CreateFromLAB
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest CMYK equivalent of a LAB color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the LAB color.

methods.name: CreateFromLCH
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest CMYK equivalent of a LCH color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the LCH color.

methods.name: CreateFromRGBA
methods.summary: Create the nearest CMYK equivalent of a RGBA color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the RGBA color.

methods.name: CreateFromXYZ
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest CMYK equivalent of an XYZ color.

returns.doc: The CMYK equivalent of the XYZ color.

methods.name: Implicit(ColorCMYK to Color)
methods.signature: public static implicit operator Color (ColorCMYK cmyk)
methods.summary: Implicitly converts a CMYK color into a .Net library color.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Alpha channel value. Alpha channels are limited to the 0~1 range.

properties.name: C
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Cyan channel value. Cyan channels are limited to the 0~1 range.

properties.name: K
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Key channel value. Key channels are limited to the 0~1 range.

properties.name: M
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Magenta channel value. Magenta channels are limited to the 0~1 range.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Yellow channel value. Yellow channels are limited to the 0~1 range.
